description: Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, these leather slippers from ganuchi are a perfect addition to your wardrobe.UpperSoft, wide leather straps with a toe separator to hold the foot in placeStitch and metallic embellishment detailing on the straps for styleSoft and ergonomically padded leather footbed for all-day comfort and styleOutsoleTextured PU outsole with multi-directional grooves for absolute grip shoe careUse a branded leather conditioner Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
